chapter_title.en: What has come in Reference to this World and One who Seeks it

parts.text: أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال

text: : من أصبح والدنيا أكبر همه شتت (الله) عليه أمره وكان فقره بين عينيه ولم يأته من الدنيا الا ما قدر له ومن كانت الآخرة أكبر همه كشف الله عنه ضيقه وجمع له أمره واتته الدنيا وهي راغمة.

en.shaykh-tahir-ridha-jaffer: 12.Faḍālah narrates from Abān, from Ziyād ibn Abī Rajāʾ, from Abū Hishām, from Abū ʿAbdillāh (a) who said, “Whoever starts his day with the world as his greatest concern [and objective], Allah will scatter his affair and his poverty will be [seen] in front of him, and nothing of this world will come to him except that which has been destined for him. But whoever’s greatest concern is the Hereafter, Allah will remove his constraints for him and gather his affair, and this world will come to him in [complete] submission.”
